descriptionHtml:
Hallberg Rassy 42E for sale 1982 | 2 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

 

The Hallberg Rassy 42E for sale 1982 stands as a proven bluewater cruiser, well-known for its seaworthiness, reliable systems, and comfortable accommodations for extended voyages (Autopilot, VHF, Heating, Battery Charger, Solar Power, Liferaft...). This particular yacht is presented in good condition, with thoughtful improvements and sound maintenance reflecting her careful ownership. She is ready for coastal cruising or longer passages with family or friends.

Specifications – Hallberg Rassy 42E for sale 1982

  • Length: 12.93 m
  • Beam: 3.78 m
  • Draft: 2.05 m
  • Hull Colour: White with blue stripe
  • Hull Material: Fibreglass (VTR)
  • Keel Material: Cast iron
  • Keel Shape: Full keel
  • Teak Cockpit: Yes
  • Sprayhood: Yes
  • Cockpit Table: Yes
  • Cockpit Covers: Complete closure for harbour and winter
  • Mooring Lines: Fore and aft with shock absorbers

Accommodation

  • Double Cabins: 2
  • Dinette Berths: 2
  • Bathrooms: 2
  • Galley: Three-burner stove, oven, refrigerator, double sink
  • Dinette Table: Large, seating for up to 8

Engine and Mechanical

  • Engine: Yanmar 4JH2-DTE, inboard
  • Engine Power: 1 unit
  • Engine Hours: 4,000 (updated March 2024)
  • Propeller: 3-blade
  • Steering: Wheel

Navigation and Electronics

  • Autopilot: Yes (needs repair)
  • VHF: Yes with AIS
  • Depth Sounder: Yes
  • Log: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Plotter: Two units (one internal, one external)
  • Wind Instrument: Yes

Electrical and Auxiliary Systems

  • Voltage: 12/230V
  • Batteries: 5
    • 1 starter (80Ah)
    • 2 for services – lights and instruments (100Ah each)
    • 2 for services – fridge, windlass, 12V sockets (100Ah each)
  • Heating: Webasto EVO 5000 (installed 2024)
  • Battery Charger: Yes
  • Boiler: Yes
  • Pressurised Water System: Yes
  • Interior Lighting: Refurbished 2022
  • 12V System: Renewed 2016
  • Hydraulic System: Renewed 2016
  • Solar Power: Two new regulators and monitoring system (2021)

Rigging and Sails

  • Rig Type: Ketch
  • Lazy Bag: Yes
  • Standing Rigging: Renewed 2018
  • Genoa: 52 m², furling, UV-protected and sock (OneSails)
  • Mainsail: 45 m², lazy bag and cover (OneSails)
  • Mizzen sail: New in 2022
  • Other Sails: Blister and storm jib (unused but aged)

Anchoring and Safety

  • Windlass: 1500W (remote at helm)
  • Bow Anchor: Rocna 35 kg
  • Stern Anchor: FOB 25 kg with 40 m line
  • Anchor Chain: 50 m, 10 mm diameter
  • Liferaft: Yes

The Hallberg Rassy 42E for sale 1982 offers proven long-range capability and comfort, featuring reliable Yanmar power, extensive navigational aids, and recent updates to key systems such as heating, lighting, and electric management. Her spacious interior layout suits extended cruising, and her ketch rig with renewed standing rigging and quality sails facilitates safe and flexible performance at sea. Viewing is recommended for those seeking a well-kept and capable cruiser ready for further adventures.Contact Us Now!
